questionHtml:
Which system has the most negative entropy change, ΔS, for the forward reaction?

A.     N2(g) + 3H2(g) ⇌ 2NH3(g)

B.     CaCO3(s) → CaO(s) + CO2(g)

C.     2S2O32−(aq) + I2(aq) → S4O62−(aq) + 2I–(aq)

D.     H2O(l) → H2O(g)

meta.title: Which system has the most negative entropy change, ΔS, for the forward reaction? A. N2(g) + 3H2(g) ⇌ 2NH3(g) B. CaCO3(s) → CaO(s) + CO2(g) C. 2S2O32−(aq) + I2(aq) → S4O62−(aq) + 2I
